perspectives.description: Mrs. Smith is a concerned mother who has discovered her daughter's struggles with mental health through her secret blog. She feels a strong responsibility to intervene for her daughter's well-being, even at the cost of her privacy.
The teenage daughter is the primary affected party, grappling with feelings of depression and self-harm. She values her privacy and may feel betrayed if her mother intervenes without her consent.

The therapist is a professional who may later work with the daughter to address her mental health issues. They are concerned about the impact of the mother's intervention on the therapeutic relationship and the daughter's trust.
